summary: P1.8-9 Juli Chat decision context: contextual suggested prompts and decision-aware mock replies wired to operations pipeline via URL param, session handoff, and top-recommendation fallback.

interfaceChanges.description: Pure functions for decision-aware chat prompts, welcome, and mock replies.
Optional ChatBootstrapOptions for decision context or top recommendation.
Resolves decision context from ?decision=, session, or pipeline top recommendation.
Adds Hỏi Juli link with decision handoff to /ai-chat.

mappings.criterion: Navigating from Decisions Review to Chat (or chat with ?decision=) shows contextual suggested prompts
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue199_chat_decision_context.test.tsx::renders workflow-specific prompt chips when ?decision= is set

mappings.criterion: Mock reply mentions decision/workflow-specific content when context present
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue199_chat_decision_context.test.tsx::mock reply references decision-specific content when context present

mappings.criterion: Test: chat page with decision context renders ≥1 workflow-specific prompt chip
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue199_chat_decision_context.test.ts::builds contextual prompts with at least one workflow-specific chip

mappings.criterion: Generic-only prompt set does not ship as default when recommendations exist
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue199_chat_decision_context.test.tsx::uses top-recommendation prompts instead of generic defaults without ?decision=
